title: Bizarre Gadgets
description: This mod adds various bizarre gadgets to the game. Such as Time amulet to stop time, Knuckle to upgrade to multiple variants, and more.
body:
A new mod from the creator of the Newerite mod.
This mod adds various bizarre gadgets to the game. Such as Time amulet to stop time, Knuckle to upgrade to multiple variants, and more.

Patreon page for supporting me: https://www.patreon.com/Masterman1988

For your feedback, you can comment or send an email to: neweritefeedback@gmail.com
This mode is made using Mcreator.

Mcreator Link: [https://mcreator.net/modification/110175/bizarre-gadgets](https://mcreator.net/modification/110175/bizarre-gadgets)

CurseForge Link: [https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bizarre-gadgets](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bizarre-gadgets)


Changelog for the version 1.1.a5:

Added: Malfunction Mechanism to Bombardier - There is a 20% chance that the Bombardier will malfunction, dealing 5 hearts of damage and entering a 10-second cooldown.

Added: Bombardier Body - Crafting Ingredient for Bombardier.

Changed: The max stack size of Bombardier Barrel from 64 to 8.

Changed: The Background Image of the Advancements Tab

Added Recipes for the following items:
- Bombardier
- Bombardier Handle
- Bombardier Body
- Bombardier Core
- Bombardier Barrel
- Bomb
